context_notes: Phase 4 chaos lab expansion is fully complete. All 6 Docker Compose profiles (jwt, registry, source, storage, ssh-weak, ldaps) are implemented and wired. 139 tests passing, no regressions. Human UAT items are non-blocking Docker runtime smoke tests. Ready to move to Phase 5 web dashboard.
